nodes.name: Gilt-edged tanager
nodes.summary: The gilt-edged tanager (Tangara cyanoventris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Brazil. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest, subtropical or tropical moist montane forest, and heavily degraded former forest. References
nodes.shortSummary: The gilt-edged tanager (Tangara cyanoventris) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Brazil.

nodes.name: Gilt-edged tanager
nodes.summary: Gilt-edged tanager（Tangara cyanoventris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Gilt-edged tanager。

nodes.name: Tangara
nodes.summary: Tangara（Tangara）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联26种鸟类，如Blue-and-black tanager、Beryl-spangled tanager、斑颊靓唐纳雀等26种鸟类。
